mapper.select:
SELECT c.cla_num, c.cla_title, c.cla_goal, u.user_name, c.cla_status, c.cla_startdate, c.cla_enddate, c.cla_maxstu, c.cla_views, c.cla_thumb, c.cla_save_name, c.cla_save_path, (SELECT tet_num FROM test WHERE cla_num = c.cla_num AND ROWNUM = 1) as tetNum FROM class c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_num = u.user_num
c.user_num = #{userNum}
AND c.cla_title LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY c.cla_num DESC

select cla_num, cla_title, cla_goal, user_name, cla_status, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_views, cla_thumb, cla_save_name, cla_save_path from class c inner join users u on c.user_num = u.user_num
c.user_num = #{userNum}
and cla_title like '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%'
order by cla_num desc

select cla_num, cla_title, cla_content, cla_goal, cla_category, cla_complete, user_name, cla_status, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_views, cla_thumb, cla_save_name, cla_save_path from class c inner join users u on c.user_num = u.user_num where cla_num = #{claNum}
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_class.nextval FROM dual
insert into class(cla_num, cla_title, cla_content, cla_goal, cla_category, user_num, cla_startdate, cla_enddate, cla_maxstu, cla_complete, cla_thumb, cla_save_name, cla_save_path) values (#{claNum}, #{claTitle}, #{claContent}, #{claGoal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{claCategory}, #{userNum}, #{claStartDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{claEndDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{claMaxStu, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{claComplete, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{claThumb}, #{claSaveName}, #{claSavePath})
mapper.select: select seq_class.nextval as cla_num from dual

SELECT u.user_num, u.user_name, u.user_email FROM users u INNER JOIN classapply ca ON u.user_num = ca.user_num WHERE ca.cla_num = #{claNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MESSAGE m WHERE m.ms_receiver_num = u.user_num AND m.tet_num = #{tetNum} ) ORDER BY u.user_name ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users u inner join classapply ca on u.user_num = ca.user_num WHERE ca.cla_num = #{claNum}
AND ( u.user_name LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%' OR u.user_email LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%' )

SELECT c.cla_num, c.cla_title, c.cla_category, c.cla_content, c.cla_goal, c.cla_complete, c.cla_startdate, c.cla_enddate, c.cla_maxstu, c.cla_status, c.cla_views, u.user_name, u.user_photo, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM classapply ca WHERE ca.cla_num = c.cla_num) AS applyCnt FROM class c INNER JOIN users u ON c.user_num = u.user_num
c.cla_status = '승인완료' AND c.cla_enddate >= SYSDATE
AND c.cla_title LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%'
AND c.cla_category = #{category}
ORDER BY c.cla_views DESC
ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM classapply ca WHERE ca.cla_num = c.cla_num) / c.cla_maxstu DESC
ORDER BY c.cla_num DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class c
c.cla_status = '승인완료' AND c.cla_enddate >= SYSDATE
AND c.cla_title LIKE '%' || #{pageMaker.keyword} || '%'
AND c.cla_category = #{category}
